responses: Hi there! Welcome to ShopAll. I can help with products, pricing, orders, returns, or store info. What do you need?
Hello! I'm the ShopAll assistant. Ask me anything about our store, products, or how we work.

ShopAll is open Monday to Saturday 8am–8pm, and Sunday 10am–6pm (West Africa Time). We're closed on public holidays.
Our store is at 14 Commerce Road, Ikeja, Lagos, Nigeria. We also deliver nationwide across all 36 states.
Yes, we deliver nationwide! Lagos orders arrive in 1–2 business days. Other states take 3–5 business days. Delivery fees depend on your location and are calculated at checkout.

patterns: how long do i have to return
responses: You can return any item within 7 days of delivery for a full refund, provided it is unused and in its original packaging. To start a return, visit our Returns page or contact us via Live Chat.

To place an order: browse our products, click the item you want, and follow the checkout steps. We accept bank transfer, debit/credit card, and cash on delivery. You'll get an order confirmation by email once it's placed.
We accept bank transfer, debit and credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), and cash on delivery for eligible locations. All online payments are secured.
ShopAll carries products across 7 categories: Electronics, Fashion, Home & Kitchen, Beauty, Sports & Fitness, Stationery, and Food. Use the category filter on the homepage to browse each section.
Our Electronics section includes wireless headphones, a mechanical keyboard, wireless mouse, smart LED desk lamp, and a 20000mAh power bank. Prices range from ₦3,200 to ₦18,900.
Our Fashion section has a Men's Oxford Shirt (₦5,500), Women's Floral Midi Dress (₦8,200), Unisex Canvas Sneakers (₦9,800), Leather Crossbody Bag (₦14,500), and Polarized Sunglasses (₦4,200).

Home & Kitchen items include a Stainless Steel Water Bottle (₦2,800), Non-Stick Frying Pan Set (₦11,200), Bamboo Cutting Board (₦3,500), Electric Kettle (₦6,800), and a Minimalist Wall Clock (₦4,100).
Beauty products include a Vitamin C Brightening Serum (₦5,900), Electric Facial Cleansing Brush (₦8,700), and a Men's Grooming Kit (₦7,200).
Sports & Fitness items include a Non-Slip Yoga Mat (₦4,500), Adjustable Dumbbell Set (₦22,000), and a Speed Cable Jump Rope (₦1,800).
Stationery items include a Hardcover Dotted Notebook A5 (₦2,200) and a 12-colour Gel Pen Set (₦1,500).
Our Food section has Organic Honey 500g (₦3,800) and a Mixed Nuts Gift Box 400g (₦5,200). Both are natural and preservative-free.
Our prices range from ₦1,500 (Gel Pen Set) to ₦22,000 (Adjustable Dumbbells). All prices are in Nigerian Naira and are displayed on each product card. We also run weekly deals.
We run weekly deals on selected products — check the homepage banner for current offers. You can also sign up for our newsletter to get notified about promotions.

To track your order, visit the 'Track Order' page in the footer and enter your order ID. You should also have received a tracking link in your confirmation email. If you're having trouble, contact us via Live Chat.

I'm sorry to hear that. For product issues, damaged items, or incorrect orders — please reach our live support team directly via the Live Chat link in the footer. They'll resolve it for you as fast as possible.
You can reach us via Live Chat (footer link), email at support@shopall.com, or call 0800-SHOPALL (0800-746725). Our support team is available Monday–Saturday 8am–6pm.
No problem — click the 'Live Chat' link in our website footer to connect with a live support agent right away.
All products shown on the site are currently in stock. If a product becomes unavailable, it will be marked accordingly. For bulk orders or specific stock queries, contact us via Live Chat.

ShopAll is a Nigerian general store offering quality products across electronics, fashion, home goods, beauty, sports, stationery, and food — all in one place, at fair prices, with nationwide delivery.
